name: Finding Report
about: Report a Black Vault finding

## Finding Details

- ID: F###
- Severity: P0 / P1 / P2
- Category: Security / Reliability / Performance / Maintainability
- File: `path/to/file`
- Line: N

## Description

Describe the issue and why it matters.

## Evidence

Add code, logs, or reproduction details.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Fix implemented
- [ ] Test added or updated
- [ ] `bash scripts/run-all-gates.sh` passes
- [ ] Status updated to `VERIFIED`
